evidence_description: Distinct HET ID is provisional diversity only.
Canonical ligand graph hash is required for final grouping.
Scaffold cluster review is required for final grouping.
Protein accession is required for target grouping.
Protein sequence cluster is required for final grouping.
Covalent event identity supports but does not prove independence.
Different PDB IDs are not independence evidence.
PDB number proximity is not similarity evidence.
Controlled raw mmCIF struct_conn crosscheck is required.
Manual candidate review is required before acquisition.
Acquisition does not establish group independence.
Final leakage review is required before any split.
